topic: There is a wear pattern in my hallway carpet that leads to a wall with no door
title: There Is a Wear Pattern in My Hallway Carpet That Leads to a Wall | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a wear pattern in my hallway carpet that leads to a wall. The wall has no door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a narrow apartment hallway with a darker worn path visible across the carpet ending at a blank south wall, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two bedroom apartment. Six years. New construction.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a modern low rise apartment building at dusk with the unit balcony visible, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Walk from kitchen to bedroom daily.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hardwood floor transition to carpet in an apartment hallway, no figures, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed last August. Narrow worn path perpendicular to my route.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a beige hallway carpet showing a distinct darker rectangular worn track running crosswise to the natural foot traffic direction, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Thought it was a previous tenant.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty modern apartment hallway with bare walls and beige carpet, dim natural light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Apartment was new construction. No previous tenant.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a glossy printed apartment lease document on a wooden desk showing the move in date, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Vacuumed the wear pattern. Pile lifted. Discoloration stayed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a vacuum cleaner upright on a hallway carpet with a visible darker line still showing through the freshly vacuumed pile, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Stain follows the same line. Ends at the south wall.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a beige hallway carpet showing a continuous darker stripe ending at the base of a smooth painted wall, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Knocked on the wall along the line.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand pressing against a painted hallway wall with knuckles raised in a knocking position, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Hollow at the end of the line. Faint outline of a door frame painted over.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a painted wall under flashlight beam showing the faint rectangular outline of a door frame beneath the paint, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not opened the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of an apartment hallway at night with the faint door outline barely visible at the end of the carpet wear, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The wear pattern is now visible on the other side of the hallway too. Something walks both ways.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hallway carpet showing two parallel darker worn tracks running in opposite directions on opposite sides of the hall, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
